title: deployment.md missing rate limit on /admin/webauthn/register/begin
description: POST /admin/webauthn/register/begin accepts the admin password in the POST body (webauthn.rs:142) and is a valid brute-force target. However, it is not listed in docs/deployment.md 'Required proxy behaviors' section (line 102) and the nginx example location regex (line 66) only matches ^/(oauth/authorize|oauth/token), which does NOT match /admin/webauthn/register/begin. An attacker could brute-force the admin password through this endpoint without proxy rate limiting. Fix: add /admin/webauthn/register/begin to both the nginx location regex and the 'Required proxy behaviors' list.
